Sandbox_PhobosLib_EnableExperimentalFeat:
Enables work-in-progress features across all Phobos mods that are still under active development.

-These features may be incomplete, unbalanced, or subject to change;
-ON: Experimental recipes and items are available;
-OFF (default): Experimental content is hidden.

Requires a game restart to take effect.
Sandbox_PhobosLib_EnableDebugLogging_too:
Enables verbose debug logging for the Phobos Shared Library to the game console (Lua debug output).

WARNING: This is a DEVELOPER AND TROUBLESHOOTING tool.

-Produces large amounts of console output;
-May cause minor performance degradation;
-Useful for diagnosing mod conflicts, recipe issues, or reporting bugs;
-Independent of PZ's -debug launch flag (works even without it).

-OFF (default): Normal operation. Only startup and error messages logged.
-ON: Verbose logging. All PhobosLib internal operations logged to console.

Leave OFF unless actively troubleshooting. Requires a game restart to take effect.
Sandbox_PhobosLib_EnableStrictMode_toolt:
Disables defensive error suppression across all Phobos mods. When enabled, errors that are normally caught silently will instead crash with full stack traces, making bugs much easier to find and report.

WARNING: This WILL cause crashes on errors that are normally handled gracefully.

-Intended for mod developers and bug reporters ONLY;
-Errors propagate with full stack traces instead of being silently caught;
-API probing (cross-build compatibility checks) is NOT affected;
-Enable this when asked to reproduce a bug for a detailed crash report.

-OFF (default): Defensive error handling active. Graceful degradation.
-ON: Errors propagate immediately. Expect crashes on edge cases.

Leave OFF for normal play. Requires a game restart to take effect.
